required_complexity_patterns.notes: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root

reference_templates.notes: Label text split across multiple span elements

reference_templates.title: Radio styled as buttons
reference_templates.notes: Native radios hidden; visible pill buttons styled via CSS class

reference_templates.title: Question number prefixes

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Reference DOM (Split span label fragments): Label text split across multiple span elements Reference DOM (Radio styled as buttons): Native radios hidden; visible pill buttons styled via CSS class Reference DOM (Question number prefixes): Fields prefixed with Q7. Q12. style question numbers Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: custom-combobox, details-accordion, aria-label-only, table-layout, shadow-host. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: definition list dl/dt/dd label pairs. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Split span label fragments; Radio styled as buttons; Question number prefixes.
